__global__: Use only English text from the document. Ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. Exception: contract_no may use a Russian label or OCR variants but must return digits only. If only Russian text is present, leave the field empty.
contract_no: Extract the contract identifier by labels such as "Contract No.", "CONTRACT No.", "Contract number", "Agreement No.", "Contract #". OCR variants like "KOHTPAKT No." can appear; treat them as contract labels. If the label is in Russian ("Контракт №", "Договор №"), you may still use it, but return digits only (no letters or symbols). Prefer the English label if present. Output digits only (example: "220521").
contract_date: Find the contract date by labels "Contract date", "Date of contract", or "Date". Keep the exact format from the document (no normalization) and add to contract_date. Use only English text from the document; ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. If only Russian text is present, leave empty.
seller: Identify the seller by labels "Seller", "Supplier", "Exporter". Return only the company name (no address, no roles, no extra words) and add to seller. Use only English text from the document; ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. If only Russian text is present, leave empty.
buyer: Identify the buyer by labels "Buyer", "Purchaser", "Customer", "Consignee". Return only the company name (no address, no roles, no extra words) and add to buyer. Use only English text from the document; ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. If only Russian text is present, leave empty.
total_price: Extract the overall contract value by labels "Total amount", "Contract value", "Total price", or "Total". Keep currency and number formatting exactly as printed; if both numeric and words are present, use the numeric value. Add to total_price. Use only English text from the document; ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. If only Russian text is present, leave empty.
incoterms: Extract Incoterms (three-letter code EXW/FOB/CFR/CIF/DAP, etc.) and, if shown, the place (port/city). Keep exactly as in the document and add to incoterms. Use only English text from the document; ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. If only Russian text is present, leave empty.
terms_of_payment: Find payment terms by labels "Terms of payment", "Payment terms", or "Payment". Keep the full wording (e.g., "ADV. 20%, BALANCE C/COPY DOC.") and add to terms_of_payment. Use only English text from the document; ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. If only Russian text is present, leave empty.
bank_details: Extract seller bank details for payment (bank, bank address, account/IBAN, SWIFT/BIC, correspondent bank, beneficiary, etc.). Use the block under "Seller"/"The Seller" (or "Продавец") and stop before any buyer section. Keep the full block as complete as possible (include all lines, do not truncate) and add to bank_details. Use only English text from the document; ignore Russian labels/values and do not translate. If only Russian text is present, leave empty.
